theorem rootedChildCount_factorialTreeSum_normalized_le_four_pow
    (n : ℕ) :
    ((n : ℝ) + 1) *
        (((n + 1).factorial : ℝ))⁻¹ *
        (∑ T ∈ spanningTrees (⊤ : SimpleGraph (Fin (n + 1))),
          ∏ v : Fin (n + 1), ((rootedChildCount T v).factorial : ℝ))
      ≤ (4 : ℝ) ^ n := by
  -- Proof body is in the pinned upstream source.
  ...
